description: Local-first discussion room for coordinating specialization-aware AI responses and capturing structured decisions for downstream execution.
objectives: Reduce coordination overhead across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.
Produce structured decision records suitable for a future execution bridge.
Validate the multi-model specialization premise via self-bootstrapping.
constraints: Single operator, single project, single active thread for v0.1.
No code execution, no repository modification, no external integrations.
